title: Facelift Beauty Classifier (Binary)

# Facelift Beauty Classifier (Binary)

Authors: Joglekar, Sagar
Published: 2019-05-20T15:26:21Z
Subjects: Arts and Humanities, Computer and Information Science, Social Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/ATXYTP

This dataset contains the Beauty classifier models, trained in Caffe. The set contains the prototext definition, binaryproto mean image and the actual model weights.

Citation: Joglekar, Sagar, 2019, "Facelift Beauty Classifier (Binary)", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/ATXYTP, Harvard Dataverse, V1
